title: PAYE changes for the umbrella company market
body: "An umbrella company employs workers on behalf of agencies and the businesses the workers do the work for (the end client). This measure makes recruitment agencies or end clients accountable for Pay as You Earn (PAYE) on payments to workers supplied through umbrella companies.  If the labour supply chain has:   more than one agency, the rules apply to the agency that has the direct contract with the end client to supply the worker no agency, the rules apply to the end client   This measure will have effect from 6 April 2026.  "
